title: Widget Limitation "reminders"

posts.author: vmccoy (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the “Reminder” bell function is only available in the updates section but not within the update widget. Our team heavily relies on custom views to highlight key information in a consistent custom view across all boards, and leverage widgets. The absence of the reminder feature in this widget creates unnecessary friction, forcing us to switch views just to set an update reminder. The reminder feature should appear in the widget, not just the section view.

What are you trying to achieve

We want to streamline our workflow by enabling the Reminder bell feature directly within the update widget. Adding this functionality would enhance efficiency, reduce context-switching, and allow teams to fully operate from their tailored board views without losing access to this essential scheduling/reminder tool.
